'''鈭歜-t-n''' ('''kabatan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:duco|duco]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:duco|duco]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-t-n
|-
! Lemma
| kabatan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibatan|thibatan]] || [[word:jibatan|jibatan]] || [[word:shibatan|shibatan]] || [[word:kibatan|kibatan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubatan|thuthubatan]] || [[word:jujubatan|jujubatan]] || [[word:shushubatan|shushubatan]] || [[word:kukubatan|kukubatan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubatan|thubatan]] || [[word:jubatan|jubatan]] || [[word:shubatan|shubatan]] || [[word:kubatan|kubatan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubatan|thubatan]] || [[word:jubatan|jubatan]] || [[word:shubatan|shubatan]] || [[word:kubatan|kubatan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebatan|thebatan]] || [[word:jebatan|jebatan]] || [[word:shebatan|shebatan]] || [[word:kebatan|kebatan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobatan|thothobatan]] || [[word:jojobatan|jojobatan]] || [[word:shoshobatan|shoshobatan]] || [[word:kokobatan|kokobatan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobatan|thobatan]] || [[word:jobatan|jobatan]] || [[word:shobatan|shobatan]] || [[word:kobatan|kobatan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobatan|thobatan]] || [[word:jobatan|jobatan]] || [[word:shobatan|shobatan]] || [[word:kobatan|kobatan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:batan|batan]] || [[word:batan|batan]] || [[word:batan|batan]] || [[word:batan|batan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:batan|batan]] || [[word:batan|batan]] || [[word:batan|batan]] || [[word:batan|batan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:batan|batan]] || [[word:batan|batan]] || [[word:batan|batan]] || [[word:batan|batan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:batan|batan]] || [[word:batan|batan]] || [[word:batan|batan]] || [[word:batan|batan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙batan|th忙batan]] || [[word:j忙batan|j忙batan]] || [[word:sh忙batan|sh忙batan]] || [[word:k忙batan|k忙batan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabatan|thathabatan]] || [[word:jajabatan|jajabatan]] || [[word:shashabatan|shashabatan]] || [[word:kakabatan|kakabatan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabatan|thabatan]] || [[word:jabatan|jabatan]] || [[word:shabatan|shabatan]] || [[word:kabatan|kabatan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabatan|thabatan]] || [[word:jabatan|jabatan]] || [[word:shabatan|shabatan]] || [[word:kabatan|kabatan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabatan|shabatan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabatan|goshabatan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabatan|gokishabatan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabatann眉|shabatann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabatannkn眉|goshabatannkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabatann眉|gokishabatann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabatansh毛|shabatansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabatannksh毛|goshabatannksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabatansh毛|gokishabatansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabatanro|shabatanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabatannkro|goshabatannkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabatanro|gokishabatanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabatanmu|shabatanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabatannkmu|goshabatannkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabatanmu|gokishabatanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabatansher|shabatansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabatannksher|goshabatannksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabatansher|gokishabatansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabatanng|shabatanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabatannkng|goshabatannkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabatanng|gokishabatanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabatanya|shabatanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabatannkya|goshabatannkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabatanya|gokishabatanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabatanyam|shabatanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabatannkyam|goshabatannkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabatanyam|gokishabatanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabatann眉sh毛|shabatann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabatannkn眉sh毛|goshabatannkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabatann眉sh毛|gokishabatann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabatann眉ro|shabatann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabatannkn眉ro|goshabatannkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabatann眉ro|gokishabatann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabatann眉mu|shabatann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabatannkn眉mu|goshabatannkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabatann眉mu|gokishabatann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabatansh毛n眉|shabatansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabatannksh毛n眉|goshabatannksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabatansh毛n眉|gokishabatansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabatansh毛ro|shabatansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabatannksh毛ro|goshabatannksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabatansh毛ro|gokishabatansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabatansh毛mu|shabatansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabatannksh毛mu|goshabatannksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabatansh毛mu|gokishabatansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabatanron眉|shabatanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabatannkron眉|goshabatannkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabatanron眉|gokishabatanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabatanrosh毛|shabatanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabatannkrosh毛|goshabatannkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabatanrosh毛|gokishabatanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabatanromu|shabatanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabatannkromu|goshabatannkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabatanromu|gokishabatanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabatanmun眉|shabatanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabatannkmun眉|goshabatannkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabatanmun眉|gokishabatanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabatanmush毛|shabatanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabatannkmush毛|goshabatannkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabatanmush毛|gokishabatanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabatanmuro|shabatanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabatannkmuro|goshabatannkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabatanmuro|gokishabatanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
